Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11887 0 0}Thank you for coming with me. I think I feel a bit better now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}I used to call my aunt on the weekend and on holidays...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}If she was still alive, I would call her today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11865 0 0}That is something I hope to avoid.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 112 3 25 25}Since my aunt is no longer there to support my studying abroad, I fear I will not be able to return here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe seems devastated.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 112 0 25 25}Since my aunt is no longer there to support my studying abroad, I fear I will not be able to return here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe looks delighted.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11846 0 0}{f 5 13 15 15 112}Oh, you are thinking of my aunt? Thank you very much! Arigato! You are very kind![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 112 0 25 25}I do wish to attend the funeral... But I cannot go back at this time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}Since my aunt is no longer there to support my studying abroad, I fear I will not be able to return here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe looks happy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11839 0 0}Ah, my aunt will be turning in her grave if I stay like this any longer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 112 1 25 25}I will go home and put myself to work at the sewing machine. Thank you for today, {f 4 2}-dono.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I saw Bebe off before returning to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
